# MHS BLOOM

> A bilingual (English/Arabic) skincare reference. 19 sourced ingredient explainers, a growing answers hub, and 1,682 decoded products. Every claim is referenced to a primary source. No brand can pay to change a rating.

## Data

- [Skincare by the Numbers](https://mhsbloom.com/stats/): descriptive facts from the reference of 1,682 products across 82 brands.

## Answers

- [Can I use retinaldehyde (retinal) together with niacinamide?](https://mhsbloom.com/answers/can-i-use-retinaldehyde-together-with-niacinamide/)
- [Should I use bakuchiol and a retinoid (retinol/retinal) together?](https://mhsbloom.com/answers/should-i-use-bakuchiol-and-a-retinoid-together/)
- [Can I layer several brightening actives together, like alpha arbutin, tranexamic acid, niacinamide and azelaic acid?](https://mhsbloom.com/answers/can-i-layer-several-brightening-actives-together-like-alpha-arbutin-tr/)
- [What is niacinamide and what does it do for skin?](https://mhsbloom.com/answers/what-is-niacinamide-and-what-does-it-do-for-skin/)
- [Which ingredient helps the look of dryness?](https://mhsbloom.com/answers/which-ingredient-helps-the-look-of-dryness/)
- [Which ingredient helps the look of blemished-looking skin?](https://mhsbloom.com/answers/which-ingredient-helps-the-look-of-blemished-looking-skin/)
- [Which ingredient helps the look of fine lines?](https://mhsbloom.com/answers/which-ingredient-helps-the-look-of-fine-lines/)
- [Which skincare ingredients should I be careful with during pregnancy or breastfeeding?](https://mhsbloom.com/answers/which-skincare-ingredients-should-i-be-careful-with-during-pregnancy-o/)
- [Which ingredients can make my skin more sensitive to the sun?](https://mhsbloom.com/answers/which-ingredients-can-make-my-skin-more-sensitive-to-the-sun/)
- [Should I patch-test new skincare, and which ingredients most need it?](https://mhsbloom.com/answers/should-i-patch-test-new-skincare-and-which-ingredients-most-need-it/)
- [Who should be careful with salicylic acid?](https://mhsbloom.com/answers/who-should-be-careful-with-salicylic-acid/)
- [Is Centella (Cica) safe, and who should be careful with it?](https://mhsbloom.com/answers/is-centella-safe-and-who-should-be-careful-with-it/)
- [I'm new to retinoids — how do I start one gently without wrecking my skin?](https://mhsbloom.com/answers/im-new-to-retinoids-how-do-i-start-one-gently-without-wrecking-my-skin/)
- [Which active ingredients should I use in the morning and which at night?](https://mhsbloom.com/answers/which-active-ingredients-should-i-use-in-the-morning-and-which-at-nigh/)
- [Why does everyone say I must wear sunscreen when I use a retinoid, exfoliant or brightening active?](https://mhsbloom.com/answers/why-does-everyone-say-i-must-wear-sunscreen-when-i-use-a-retinoid-exfo/)
- [What's the safest way to add a new active to my routine as a beginner?](https://mhsbloom.com/answers/whats-the-safest-way-to-add-a-new-active-to-my-routine-as-a-beginner/)
- [Is there a gentler, retinol-like option if my skin is sensitive or I'm nervous about retinoids?](https://mhsbloom.com/answers/is-there-a-gentler-retinol-like-option-if-my-skin-is-sensitive-or-im-n/)
- [Can I use a retinoid and an exfoliating acid like salicylic acid at the same time?](https://mhsbloom.com/answers/can-i-use-a-retinoid-and-an-exfoliating-acid-like-salicylic-acid-at-th/)

## Ingredients

- [Allantoin](https://mhsbloom.com/ingredients/allantoin/): A gentle soothing and skin-conditioning ingredient that helps calm and protect the skin's surface and supports a smoothe
- [Alpha Arbutin](https://mhsbloom.com/ingredients/alpha-arbutin/): A gentle brightening ingredient that helps soften the look of dark spots and even out the appearance of skin tone over t
- [Avobenzone](https://mhsbloom.com/ingredients/butyl-methoxydibenzoylmethane/): An organic (chemical) UV filter that absorbs UVA light, the wavelengths most associated with the look of premature skin 
- [Azelaic Acid](https://mhsbloom.com/ingredients/azelaic-acid/): A multitasking acid that helps the look of redness and bumps, supports a more even-looking tone by fading the appearance
- [Bakuchiol (plant-derived retinol-alternative)](https://mhsbloom.com/ingredients/bakuchiol/): A plant-derived ingredient often used as a gentler, retinol-like option in skincare for the look of fine lines, more eve
- [Centella Asiatica (Cica / Gotu Kola / Tiger Grass)](https://mhsbloom.com/ingredients/centella-asiatica-extract/): A calming plant extract used to soothe the look of redness, support a comfortable skin barrier, and help skin look smoot
- [Ceramides](https://mhsbloom.com/ingredients/ceramide-np/): Skin-identical barrier lipids that help skin hold water and look calm and less reactive.
- [Glycerin (Glycerol)](https://mhsbloom.com/ingredients/glycerin/): A humectant that pulls water into the upper skin and holds it there, helping skin look and feel hydrated and supple.
- [Hyaluronic Acid (HA)](https://mhsbloom.com/ingredients/sodium-hyaluronate/): A humectant that draws and holds water in the upper skin layers, leaving skin feeling plumper and more hydrated. It is n
- [L-Ascorbic Acid (Vitamin C)](https://mhsbloom.com/ingredients/ascorbic-acid/): A water-soluble antioxidant that helps brighten uneven tone, supports the look of firmness by aiding the skin's collagen
- [Niacinamide (Vitamin B3, nicotinamide)](https://mhsbloom.com/ingredients/niacinamide/): A water-soluble form of vitamin B3 that supports the look of a healthy skin barrier, helps the appearance of even tone, 
- [Panthenol (Pro-Vitamin B5)](https://mhsbloom.com/ingredients/panthenol/): A water-attracting, barrier-soothing ingredient that helps skin hold moisture and feel calmer and smoother.
- [Retinaldehyde (Retinal)](https://mhsbloom.com/ingredients/retinal/): A vitamin A form (retinoid) used in skincare to support the look of smoother texture, softer fine lines, more even tone,
- [Salicylic Acid (BHA — beta hydroxy acid)](https://mhsbloom.com/ingredients/salicylic-acid/): An oil-soluble exfoliant that works inside pores to lift away dead surface cells and excess oil, supporting the look of 
- [Squalane (saturated, shelf-stable form of squalene; sourced from olive or sugarcane)](https://mhsbloom.com/ingredients/squalane/): A lightweight, skin-identical emollient that softens the look and feel of skin and helps slow water loss, with a dry, no
- [Tranexamic Acid (TXA / TA)](https://mhsbloom.com/ingredients/tranexamic-acid/): A calming, brightening ingredient used in skincare to even out the look of skin tone and soften the appearance of dark p
- [Urea (Carbamide)](https://mhsbloom.com/ingredients/urea/): A water-binding humectant at lower strengths and a gentle keratolytic (softens and helps shed rough, dry-looking skin) a
- [Vitamin E (alpha-tocopherol)](https://mhsbloom.com/ingredients/tocopherol/): A fat-soluble antioxidant that supports the look of the skin's lipid barrier and helps neutralize free radicals, helping
- [Zinc Oxide (mineral / inorganic UV filter)](https://mhsbloom.com/ingredients/zinc-oxide/): A mineral UV filter that helps shield the look of skin across both UVA and UVB; also used as a gentle skin protectant in

## Products

- [Products, decoded](https://mhsbloom.com/products/): 549 skincare products decoded (brand, key ingredients, who it suits) — growing daily.
